info.name: LookMyClass API
info.description: LookMyClass is an EdTech SaaS platform for creating and managing academic curricula, AI-powered tests, documents, and subscriptions.

endpoints.name: Forget Password
endpoints.description: Initiates the password reset flow by sending an OTP to the user's email.

example.message: An OTP has been sent to your email

data.message: An OTP has been sent to your email

example.message: User with this email was not found

endpoints.name: Verify Password OTP
endpoints.description: Verifies the OTP sent to the user's email for password reset.

endpoints.name: Reset Password
endpoints.description: Resets the user's password using a verified OTP.

example.message: OTP has expired, please request a new one

endpoints.name: Get 2FA Status
endpoints.description: Returns the current 2FA status for the authenticated user.

example.message: Unauthorized! Please make sure you have a valid token

endpoints.name: Enable 2FA
endpoints.description: Initiates the 2FA enable flow by sending a verification code to the user's email.

example.message: Verification code sent to your email to enable 2FA

data.message: Verification code sent to your email to enable 2FA

endpoints.name: Verify Setup 2FA
endpoints.description: Completes 2FA setup by verifying the OTP sent during enable flow.

endpoints.name: Request OTP to Disable 2FA
endpoints.description: Sends an OTP to the user's email to initiate the 2FA disable flow.

endpoints.name: Disable 2FA
endpoints.description: Disables 2FA for the authenticated user using OTP and password.

endpoints.name: Verify Login 2FA
endpoints.description: Completes login when 2FA is enabled by verifying the OTP along with a temporary token.

endpoints.name: Resend Login OTP
endpoints.description: Resends the 2FA login OTP using the temporary token issued at login.

endpoints.name: Login
endpoints.description: Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens. If 2FA is enabled, returns a temporary token instead.

endpoints.name: Register
endpoints.description: Registers a new user under an existing organization. Sends an email verification link.

example.message: User added!! Please check your email for further details

data.message: User added!! Please check your email for further details

endpoints.name: Register Admin
endpoints.description: Registers a new admin user and creates a new organization simultaneously.

example.message: Admin registered!! Please check your email for further details

data.message: Admin registered!! Please check your email for further details

endpoints.name: Verify Registration
endpoints.description: Verifies the user's email using the token from the verification email.

endpoints.name: Get My Organization
endpoints.description: Returns the organization details for the currently authenticated admin.

endpoints.name: Update My Organization
endpoints.description: Updates the details of the currently authenticated admin's organization.

endpoints.name: Get My Org Users
endpoints.description: Returns all active users in the admin's organization.

endpoints.name: Get My Org Pending Users
endpoints.description: Returns all users with pending approval status in the admin's organization.

endpoints.name: Approve Pending User
endpoints.description: Approves a pending user in the admin's organization.

endpoints.name: Reject Pending User
endpoints.description: Rejects a pending user in the admin's organization.

endpoints.name: Remove User from My Org
endpoints.description: Removes a user from the admin's organization.

endpoints.name: Get All Organizations
endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of all organizations. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Get Organization by ID
endpoints.description: Returns details of a specific organization by ID. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Update Organization
endpoints.description: Updates an organization's details. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Delete Organization
endpoints.description: Deletes an organization permanently. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Get Org Users
endpoints.description: Returns all users of a specific organization. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Get Org Pending Users
endpoints.description: Returns all pending users of a specific organization. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Approve Pending User (SA)
endpoints.description: Approves a pending user in a specific organization. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Reject Pending User (SA)
endpoints.description: Rejects a pending user in a specific organization. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Remove User from Org (SA)
endpoints.description: Removes a user from a specific organization. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Create User
endpoints.description: Creates a new user within the organization. Admin or SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Get Users
endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of users. Supports search by name or email.

endpoints.name: Get My Profile
endpoints.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Update My Profile
endpoints.description: Updates the profile of the currently authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Get User by ID
endpoints.description: Returns a specific user's profile by their ID.

example.message: Target user not found or you do not have permission to access

endpoints.name: Update User Profile
endpoints.description: Updates a specific user's profile. Admin or SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Update User Role
endpoints.description: Updates the role of a specific user. Valid roles: SUPERADMIN, ADMIN, USER.

messages: role must be one of the following values: SUPERADMIN, ADMIN, USER

endpoints.name: Delete User
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a user by their ID.

example.message: Target user not found or you do not have permission to access

endpoints.name: Change Email
endpoints.description: Initiates an email change request by sending a verification code to the new email address.

example.message: Verification code sent to your new email address

data.message: Verification code sent to your new email address

endpoints.name: Verify New Email
endpoints.description: Completes the email change flow by verifying the OTP sent to the new email.

endpoints.name: Get Profile
endpoints.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Change Password
endpoints.description: Changes the current user's password by providing both old and new passwords.

endpoints.name: Get All Subscription Plans
endpoints.description: Returns all subscription plans. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Get Subscription Plan by ID
endpoints.description: Returns a specific subscription plan by ID. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Create Subscription Plan
endpoints.description: Creates a new subscription plan. SuperAdmin only. Creates the plan in Razorpay.

endpoints.name: Update Subscription Plan
endpoints.description: Updates an existing subscription plan. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Delete Subscription Plan
endpoints.description: Deactivates a subscription plan. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Get User Subscription
endpoints.description: Returns the current subscription status of a specific user. SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Grant Subscription to User
endpoints.description: Grants a subscription plan to a user directly (without payment). SuperAdmin only.

endpoints.name: Cancel User Subscription
endpoints.description: Cancels a user's subscription. Can cancel immediately or at end of billing cycle.

queryParams.name: immediate
queryParams.description: Cancel immediately (true) or at end of billing cycle (false)

example.message: Subscription will be cancelled at the end of current billing cycle

data.message: Subscription will be cancelled at the end of current billing cycle

endpoints.name: Get Subscription Plans
endpoints.description: Returns all available subscription plans for the user to choose from.

endpoints.name: Start Trial
endpoints.description: Activates a free trial subscription for the authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Get Current Plan
endpoints.description: Returns the current active subscription plan for the authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Purchase Subscription
endpoints.description: Initiates a subscription purchase via Razorpay. Returns order details to complete payment on frontend.

endpoints.name: Verify Payment
endpoints.description: Verifies a Razorpay payment and activates the subscription for the user.

example.message: Payment verified and subscription activated successfully

data.message: Payment verified and subscription activated successfully

endpoints.name: Get Payment History
endpoints.description: Returns the payment history for the authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Get Payment by ID
endpoints.description: Returns details of a specific payment record.

endpoints.name: Cancel Subscription
endpoints.description: Cancels the current user's active subscription at the end of the billing cycle.

example.message: Subscription will be cancelled at the end of current billing cycle

data.message: Subscription will be cancelled at the end of current billing cycle

endpoints.name: Create Curriculum
endpoints.description: Creates a new curriculum within the organization.

endpoints.name: Get Curriculums
endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of all curriculums in the organization.

endpoints.name: Get Curriculum by ID
endpoints.description: Returns details of a specific curriculum by ID.

endpoints.name: Update Curriculum
endpoints.description: Updates a curriculum's name or description.

endpoints.name: Delete Curriculum
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a curriculum and all its subjects, topics, and questions.

endpoints.name: Get Curriculum Stats
endpoints.description: Returns aggregate statistics for a curriculum including subject, topic, and question counts.

endpoints.name: Create Subject
endpoints.description: Creates a new subject within a curriculum.

endpoints.name: Get Subjects
endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of all subjects in a curriculum.

endpoints.name: Get Subject by ID
endpoints.description: Returns details of a specific subject.

endpoints.name: Update Subject
endpoints.description: Updates a subject's name.

endpoints.name: Delete Subject
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a subject and all its topics and questions.

endpoints.name: Create Topic
endpoints.description: Creates a new topic within a subject.

endpoints.name: Get Topics
endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of all topics in a subject.

endpoints.name: Get Topic by ID
endpoints.description: Returns details of a specific topic.

endpoints.name: Update Topic
endpoints.description: Updates a topic's name, complexity, or question count.

endpoints.name: Delete Topic
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a topic and all its questions.

endpoints.name: Create API Key
endpoints.description: Creates a new API key. The raw key is shown only once — store it securely.

endpoints.name: Get API Keys
endpoints.description: Returns all API keys for the authenticated user. Keys are masked for security.

endpoints.name: Get API Key by ID
endpoints.description: Returns details of a specific API key by ID.

endpoints.name: Update API Key
endpoints.description: Updates the label or active status of an API key.

endpoints.name: Delete API Key
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes an API key. This action is irreversible.

endpoints.name: Verify API Key
endpoints.description: Tests if an API key is valid. Pass the key in the x-api-key header.

endpoints.name: Upload Document
endpoints.description: Uploads a PDF document to S3 and associates it with a curriculum. Supports multipart form data.

endpoints.name: Get Documents
endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of documents. Can be filtered by curriculum.

endpoints.name: Get Storage Info
endpoints.description: Returns storage usage statistics for the authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Get File Count
endpoints.description: Returns the total count of documents for the authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Get Document by ID
endpoints.description: Returns details of a specific document by ID.

endpoints.name: Download Document
endpoints.description: Returns a pre-signed S3 URL for downloading the document. URL is valid for 72 hours.

endpoints.name: Delete Document
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a document from storage and the database.

endpoints.name: Generate MCQ
endpoints.description: Uses AI to generate multiple-choice questions from an uploaded document.

mcqs.question: What happens to the current amplitude at resonance in an LCR circuit?

endpoints.name: Create Test Series
endpoints.description: Creates a new AI-powered test series from document(s). The test is generated asynchronously.

endpoints.name: Get Test Series
endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of all test series. Can be filtered by status.

queryParams.name: status
queryParams.description: Filter by status (PENDING, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED)

endpoints.name: Get Test Series by ID
endpoints.description: Returns the full details of a test series including all questions and answers.

endpoints.name: Delete Test Series
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a test series and all its questions.
